steps.title: Set the two noun forms
steps.content: The photos belong to one photographer, Ansel Adams, so the first noun must be singular possessive. The phrase many of the also requires a plural noun for the pictures themselves.

steps.title: Place apostrophes correctly
steps.content: A wrongly makes photo's possessive, B has both a nonpossessive photographers and possessive photo's, and D fails to show Adams's possession. The form with singular possessive photographer's and plural photos works. The answer is C.
